title: A method of texturing photovoltaic silicon wafers
claims: Claims Claims 1. A metal-free method of texturing photovoltaic (PV) silicon wafers, the method comprising: mixing nitric acid and sulphuric acid to form a first mixture, wherein the sulphuric acid is at a temperature ofâ¤ 20Â°C; adding hydrofluoric acid to the first mixture to form an acid bath; cooling the acid bath; and etching a surface of a PV silicon wafer in the cooled acid bath at a predetermined temperature for a pre-determined period of time. 2. The method according to claim 1 , wherein the PV silicon wafer is a diamond- wire sawn (DWS) multicrystalline silicon (mc-Si) wafer. 3. The method according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the cooling comprises cooling the acid bath to a temperature ofâ¤ 30Â°C. 4. The method according to any preceding claim, wherein the concentration of the nitric acid is 40-100 w/w %, the concentration of the sulphuric acid is 50-100 w/w % and the concentration of the hydrofluoric acid is 40-100 w/w %. 5. The method according to any preceding claim, wherein the volume ratio of the nitric acid:sulphuric acid:hydrofluoric acid comprised in the acid bath based on the total volume of the acid bath is 0.5-1 : 1 1-20:0.5-1. 6. The method according to claim 5, wherein the volume ratio of the nitric acid:sulphuric acid:hydrofluoric acid comprised in the acid bath based on the total volume of the acid bath is 1 : 16: 1. 7. The method according to any preceding claim, wherein the pre-determined temperature is 20-30Â°C. 8. The method according to any preceding claim, wherein the pre-determined period of time isâ¤ 10 minutes. 9. The method according to any preceding claim, wherein the etching comprises dipping the PV silicon wafer in the acid bath, rolling the acid bath on a surface of the PV silicon wafer, spraying the acid bath on a surface of the PV silicon wafer, or a combination thereof. 10. The method according to any preceding claim, wherein the etching forms nano- sized features comprising pores, craters or a combination thereof on the surface of the PV silicon wafer. 1 1. The method according to claim 10, wherein the nano-sized feature has an average diameter of 50-800 nm. 12. The method according to claim 10 or 11 , wherein the nano-sized feature has a depth of 20-500 nm. 13. A photovoltaic (PV) silicon wafer comprising at least one surface textured by the method of any preceding claim having a reflectance of 15-30% at wavelength of light of 400-1000 nm. 14. The PV silicon wafer according to claim 13, wherein the PV silicon wafer is a diamond-wire sawn (DWS) multicrystalline silicon (mc-Si) wafer. 15. The PV silicon wafer according to claim 13 or 14, wherein the at least one textured surface comprises nano-sized features comprising pores, craters or a combination thereof. 16. The PV silicon wafer according to claim 15, wherein the nano-sized feature has an average diameter of 50-800 nm. 17. The PV silicon wafer according to claim 15 or 16, wherein the nano-sized feature has a depth of 20-500 nm.
